title: helichrysum retrorsum var. empetroides
intro: Helichrysum retrorsum var. empetroides is a lesser-known species of the helichrysum plant, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), which is native to the island of Madeira in Portugal. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum retrorsum var. empetroides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an essential oil, tincture, or salve, which can be applied topically to the skin to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
